category_sources: Official GitHub README describes PPSS as a Bash script that executes commands, scripts, or programs in parallel
source_facts.description: shell script to execute commands in parallel
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses PPSS and Parallel Processing Shell Script
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes usage, examples, logging, and distributed mode notes
repo_sources: Official GitHub README states the project moved from Google Code to GitHub
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says PPSS uses CPU cores, can run on multiple hosts, and processes items with a user-specified command
